mnemonics.title: ROUGE Components
mnemonics.content: ROUGE-N (n-gram), ROUGE-L (longest sequence), ROUGE-W (weighted LCS), ROUGE-S (skip-bigrams)

acronyms.expansion: Metric for Evaluation of Translation with Explicit ORdering

visualTips.visualization: Imagine highlighters marking relevant text parts as decoder generates each word

analogies.analogy: Like maintaining multiple possible hiking paths, keeping top N routes based on current terrain
